capability_declaration.evidence: IEC 61850-7-3: Logical Node (LN) models; GetDirectory/GetDataDefinitions services
capability_declaration.rationale: Defines rich device capabilities via standardized logical nodes and supports service discovery mechanisms for interoperability. Coverage is partial as it targets physical equipment rather than autonomous AI agent semantics.

bounded_authority.evidence: IEC 61850-3 (Security): Authorization profiles; Manual/Auto operational modes in device models
bounded_authority.rationale: Role-based access and manual override capabilities implicitly bound operations. Lacks explicit agent autonomy limits, dynamic expiry mechanisms, or revocation protocols tailored to automated decision-making.

decision_auditability.evidence: IEC 61850-7-4: Report control objects; Time-stamped event handling and status change logging
decision_auditability.rationale: Built-in reporting services support timestamped operational logs. Coverage is partial as it tracks equipment states rather than autonomous agent reasoning traces or attribution chains.

data_governance.rationale: Standard focuses strictly on engineering communication protocols and device modeling. Contains no clauses addressing data ownership rights, consent mechanisms, or enterprise-level retention policies.
